meaning: vt.使爆发,以严词谴责vi.爆炸,电闪,怒喝n.雷酸盐,雷汞
examples: Objective: To understand the effect of compound glycyrrhizin on hepatic function of reserve in patients with chronic fulminate hepatitis.
Conclusion Diagnosis, prevent and treat the complication in an early period is the importance measure to heighten the salvage rate and lower down the mortality of fulminate hepatitis.
